name: Sidewalk Chalk
recipeIngredient: Colored Tempera Paint or Food Colors
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix 2 quarts (8 cups) of Plaster of Paris with 1 part water until smooth.
2. Add desired color using Tempera paint or a few drops of food coloring.
3. Pour the mixture into paper towel or toilet paper tubes, about 3 inches tall.
4. Let dry thoroughly for several days.
5. Remove from tubes and give to your favorite artist.
